blocks.content: Dawn broke over the wasteland.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Shall we get going?
As the three who had enjoyed their night of fun got up, Shirone stretched as well.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: It was really long.
In the world of High Gear, there's no urge to sleep. It's because they're already dreaming.
Perhaps the setting of replacing the human body with a machine fits perfectly with the undercoder.
The fun that Destroyer707 and his group enjoyed was, in a sense, a way to kill time.

blocks.speaker: Death Princess
blocks.content: Yahweh2, are you okay? Weren't you bored? We wouldn't have minded if you joined in halfway.

blocks.speaker: Yahweh
blocks.content: No, I was just thinking about various things. But it's strange not to sleep.
Yahweh's mind could endure a month in reality, but he didn't feel tired at all.

blocks.speaker: Strongest Codename
blocks.content: Even if it's a dream, it uses the brain. Wouldn't you get tired if you play for too long?

blocks.speaker: Yahweh
blocks.content: Of course. That's why we sometimes disconnect and go out. But don't worry too much. High Gear's time is completely different from reality.

blocks.speaker: Strongest Codename
blocks.content: How different?
It was natural that simultaneous events' signals wouldn't be transmitted inside High Gear.
When Shirone dreams, the Shirone in another space doesn't see that dream.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: I haven't measured it exactly, but I've heard from others that about 30 days here is equivalent to one day in reality.

blocks.speaker: Strongest Codename
blocks.content: 30 days…
Shirone was amazed.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: So, not even an hour has passed in reality. Is it because it's much deeper than Dreamo?
Thinking about the meaning of the space created by humans, Shirone slung his rifle over his shoulder.

blocks.speaker: Destroyer707
blocks.content: Let's go. We've leveled up enough yesterday, so it won't take long to reach Atogram.
After walking for about two hours, they saw a 5-meter-high iron wall at the end of the wasteland.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: This is the last gate of the Electronic Wasteland. If we get closer, gun barrels will come out of the wall and attack us.

blocks.speaker: Destroyer707
blocks.content: Yeah. To avoid that, we need this function, Reflex Response Correction.
They had reached level 10 by hunting continuously on the way here.
Shirone checked the functions through augmented reality.

blocks.speaker: Death Princess
blocks.content: Reflex Response Correction (On/Off) A function activated at level 9 that analyzes external attacks and automatically evades them.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Right, if Reflex Response Correction were better, no one would be able to hit anything.

blocks.speaker: Death Princess
blocks.content: Exactly. That's why experts sometimes turn off Reflex Response Correction. They trust their own abilities. Or they quickly toggle it on and off to get only the necessary information. But at our low level, it's essential.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: No, I'll still use it. I need to get used to the system now to apply it later.
Having made their decision, Shirone and his group started running towards the wall 500 meters away.
With level 10 output, they could jump over the 5-meter height, but the problem was the bullets.
Tat tat tat tat tat!
Hundreds of gun barrels popped out of the wall and fired at the group.
With Reflex Response Correction, Shirone's body moved quickly.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Huff! Huff!

blocks.speaker: Destroyer707
blocks.content: We have to jump as far as we can! If the probability drops below 50 percent, it gets tough!
As they got closer to the wall, the evasion probability dropped painfully.
Leaving the barrage of bullets to the AI, Shirone calculated the distance.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Now.
Boosting High Gear's output, they all leaped simultaneously.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Yahhh!
Their shouts formed an arc, and finally, they landed beyond the wall.
The gunfire ceased, and silence fell.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Phew, we made it.
As Shirone looked around, the AI output spatial information.
Beginning of the Royal Road.
Beyond the wall was a dense forest of coniferous trees, with a path leading towards a hill.
He looked up at the sound of birds, but they were creatures, and even strong ones at level 8.

blocks.speaker: Death Princess
blocks.content: The Beginning of the Royal Road is where users scattered in the Electronic Wasteland gather. No matter which wall you jump over, you pass through this path.

blocks.speaker: Destroyer707
blocks.content: Atogram is the first neutral zone you reach in High Gear. Even though it's mainly for low levels, it's surprisingly large. It's where you decide between East Country and West Country. So rankers often come to get updates or sometimes scout.
The real journey was beginning.

blocks.speaker: Destroyer707
blocks.content: West Country Guild Rank 1, Ascension.
Powerful air burst from the custom capsule, and the door clanged open.
Inside the capsule stood a beautiful woman with curly blonde hair covering her eyes.
High Gear charging complete.
With a clank, the machine shook, and black flat shoes touched the ground.
Height: 172 centimeters, weight: classified.
If it were a human body, it wouldn't exceed 55 kilograms, a slender figure.
User codename, Operator.
Undoubtedly the strongest hardware and software in High Gear.
She intentionally output a sound and sensually circled the room like a cat.

blocks.speaker: Operator
blocks.content: Not bad.
The damaged parts from the last raid had been restored.
The building used entirely by the Ascension Guild was 23 stories high, and her room was on the 22nd floor.
When she opened the door and went into the hallway, a small girl, 130 centimeters tall, was standing by the elevator.
The Operator's eyes showed a codename. Little Witch.
At level 482, she was ranked 13th overall but 7th in duels.
She was a formidable opponent.

blocks.speaker: Little Witch
blocks.content: 'Uncomfortable.'
Becoming a ranker in such a short time was unusual, but she had a unique, difficult-to-approach atmosphere.

blocks.speaker: Operator
blocks.content: What brings you to the 22nd floor?

blocks.speaker: Little Witch
blocks.content: Oh? You're logged in? I knocked, but it was quiet.

blocks.speaker: Operator
blocks.content: Since it was the guild master's exclusive floor, guild members didn't come here unless there was something special.

blocks.speaker: Little Witch
blocks.content: I went out briefly to repair my unit. Did you come to find me? What's up?

blocks.speaker: Operator
blocks.content: No, it's just… things have been strange lately.
This was exactly why Operator found it difficult to deal with Little Witch.

blocks.speaker: Operator
blocks.content: Do you know someone named Yahweh?

blocks.speaker: Little Witch
blocks.content: Yahweh?
Little Witch, who had been checking the elevator floors, turned her head faster than usual.

blocks.speaker: Little Witch
blocks.content: But her emotions were unreadable.

blocks.speaker: Operator
blocks.content: Hmm. If I know, I know; if I don't, I don't. But why Yahweh? Does it have something to do with you being sentimental lately?

blocks.speaker: Little Witch
blocks.content: He entered High Gear. We made a bet. If he beats me in a duel, I'll grant his wish.

blocks.speaker: Operator
blocks.content: Oh.
Little Witch's face was still smiling, but Operator felt a chill.

blocks.speaker: Little Witch
blocks.content: Why does that bother you?

blocks.speaker: Operator
blocks.content: I did some research, and he's much more impressive than I thought. That's fine. But he disrespected High Gear. He only wants to use me for the sake of humans in the real world.

blocks.speaker: Little Witch
blocks.content: Haha! You're completely blocked, aren't you?
It seemed like she was taking her side, but there was a sense of amusement.

blocks.speaker: Operator
blocks.content: Of course, things won't go his way. He can't beat me anyway.
The elevator door opened.

blocks.speaker: Little Witch
blocks.content: Oh, the floor.
Little Witch pressed the button for the first floor.

blocks.speaker: Operator
blocks.content: Of course, beating the undefeated Operator is tough. But it won't be easy. Actually, I know Yahweh a bit, and he's no ordinary guy.

blocks.speaker: Little Witch
blocks.content: I know.
That was why Operator was in a bad mood.

blocks.speaker: Operator
blocks.content: There was a lot of talk at yesterday's meeting. He seems to have a special sense of time. He dodged rifle bullets in bio mode. It means he's already surpassed human limits.

blocks.speaker: Little Witch
blocks.content: Wow, really? That's so cool.
Operator's nose slightly wrinkled at Little Witch's exaggerated performance.

blocks.speaker: Operator
blocks.content: The problem is he denied my world. I'll crush him. If he still doesn't understand, I'll shock his real brain if I have to…

blocks.speaker: Little Witch
blocks.content: Operator.
At the changed voice, Operator turned to see Little Witch staring at her with the same expression.

blocks.speaker: Little Witch
blocks.content: I don't care what you do. I'll support you. But if you harm the real Yahweh…

blocks.speaker: Little Witch
blocks.content: You will die.
The unit couldn't swallow, but Operator's mind gulped.

blocks.speaker: Operator
blocks.content: …Okay.
Even though she avoided reality, she knew how scary the outside world was.

blocks.speaker: Operator
blocks.content: 'Little Witch. She's really strange.'

blocks.speaker: Operator
blocks.content: She thought about asking the tutorial manager, but breaking the rules was out of the question.

blocks.speaker: Operator
blocks.content: However, from observing her in the guild, she had a guess.

blocks.speaker: Operator
blocks.content: 'Probably the former Empress of Kashan…'
According to her research, Kashan was currently ruled by Emperor Gando.

blocks.speaker: Operator
blocks.content: 'She has unlimited funds. And she's incredibly knowledgeable. Most importantly… she knew the secrets of the Holy War.'

blocks.speaker: Operator
blocks.content: 'Of course, I hacked dreams to find out.'
The most crucial evidence was that she couldn't access Little Witch's dreams by any means.

blocks.speaker: Operator
blocks.content: 'There's a chance she's not human.'

blocks.speaker: Operator
blocks.content: Don't worry. I'm not interested in the outside world. Or your relationship with Yahweh. I'll just crush Yahweh in High Gear.

blocks.speaker: Little Witch
blocks.content: Hehe, I'll look forward to it.
As Little Witch's voice softened, Operator tilted her head slightly.

blocks.speaker: Operator
blocks.content: 'It's really strange.'

blocks.speaker: Operator
blocks.content: Why did she feel hundreds of emotions from a face with almost no expression?

blocks.speaker: Operator
blocks.content: We're here.
The elevator arrived at the first floor.

blocks.speaker: Operator
blocks.content: We're here.
At the final point of the Beginning of the Royal Road, Shirone took in the sight of the distant, massive city.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: It's really amazing.
Countless skyscrapers reached the sky, and trains ran between the buildings.

blocks.speaker: Destroyer707
blocks.content: From now on, we just need to get stronger. It might get really annoying, but we'll be fine. We have Yolga's Son.
Although it was their second playthrough, Destroyer707 and his group were much more excited than the first time.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: 'We're joining Golden Wheel.'

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Dreaming of a hopeful future, Shirone and his group quickly ran down the hill.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Alright! Let's crush it!
Spatial Information: Free City, Atogram.
